entities.name: YIELD

entities.name: MINIMUM TILLAGE
entities.description: A tillage practice aimed at reducing soil disturbance.

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL TILLAGE
entities.description: A standard tillage practice involving more intensive soil disturbance.

entities.name: RESIDUE ADDITION
entities.description: The practice of adding crop residue back into the soil.

entities.name: NO-RESIDUE ADDITION
entities.description: The practice of not adding crop residue back into the soil.

entities.name: MAIZE-CHICKPEA SEQUENTIAL CROPPING
entities.description: A cropping system where maize and chickpea are grown in sequence.

entities.description: A cropping system where maize and pigeonpea are grown simultaneously.

entities.name: BROAD-BEDS AND FURROWS
entities.description: A field layout used for water management and planting.

entities.description: The experimental design used for the field experiment.

entities.description: Conditions where crop growth depends solely on rainfall.

entities.description: The monsoon cropping season.
